name: tpu-skill-claude
description: Claude Code plugins for Google Cloud TPU DevOps: the tpu-management skill and tpu-devops MCP server for Gemma 4 vLLM serving on TPU VMs.

plugins.name: tpu-management
plugins.description: Manage Google Cloud TPU capacity and Gemma 4 vLLM serving on TPU VMs: provisioning, queued resources, quotas, cost estimates, benchmarking, and SRE diagnostics via the tpu-devops MCP server.
